statusDashboard.pickCompanyHeading: Pick the company whose status page you want to manage
statusDashboard.pickCompanySubtitle: Each company has one status page. Click whichever you want to manage.
statusDashboard.overviewDescription: Host a real-time, Atlassian Statuspage-style uptime board for your own services. Components, checks, incident timeline, scheduled maintenance windows, and email/webhook subscriber notifications — all in one dashboard.
statusDashboard.mgmtCardDescription: Create your page, add components, define HTTP checks, and share your public URL.
